name: search_code
description: Search the workspace for a pattern with the v5.2-auto-selected backend (ripgrep when available, else grep). Wraps code-search.sh which caches the chosen backend at .specify/runtime/code-search.tool. Output is capped to 200 lines by default; pass no_cap=true to disable. Use over raw ripgrep/grep because the wrapper enforces consistent backend selection across agent and human callers.

paths.description: Optional path scope (relative to repo root). Defaults to repo root if empty.

no_cap.description: If true, do not cap output at 200 lines.
